segments.text: Come on, pull it off! Rising into that bair—and he's through! My heart's pounding at 225%!
segments.original_text: さすがに取ってくれ 上り空後 完成 心臓太すぎる 225%

segments.text: This isn't a game decided purely by damage percentage!
segments.original_text: パーセントでできるゲームじゃない

full_text: Come on, pull it off! Rising into that bair—and he's through! My heart's pounding at 225%! This isn't a game decided purely by damage percentage! It's all reads!
